alkylation reagent: alkylated with 30 mM acrylamide for 30 min
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 30 mM acrylamide for 30 min
cleavage agent: 600 ng of mass spectrometry grade Trypsin/LysC mix
collision energy: collision energy of 10 V and cell accelerator voltage of 5 V
fragmentation method: mass spectrometer was operated in a data-dependent mode using HCD fragmentation
instrument: mass spectrometer (Thermo Scientific, San Jose, CA)
ionization type: Mass spectrometry analysis was performed using electrospray ionization (ESI) in negative mode
